speaker: [player]
text: Honestly? This is a bad idea and I don't want to be part of it.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I respect that. You have clear boundaries. Scatha respects clear boundaries.

speaker: Vermia
text: I also think... maybe Grubwin and [player] have a point. The tunnel is a step far. What if we did something in the park instead? Under the actual moon?

speaker: Mawla
text: Public space. No trespassing. The chalk Scathagram just goes on the ground.

speaker: Dirtus
text: The moon will still be there either way.

speaker: Dirtus
text: ...Fine. Park summoning. I'll adjust the slides.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I said we're not doing a summoning.
